h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to confirm the layout and copy the values into the lab packet.
scored.actionalBreakthroughEvidence: The bottom line matches 12.01, so that space gets atomic mass.
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner successfully aligns the lab packet with the tray and correctly maps the separate line to the atomic mass.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: There is no learner resistance or breakdown to trigger a tutor strategy reversal.
scored.adaptiveMechanismQualityJustification: No adaptive mechanism was triggered or required in this highly compliant exchange.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn for the tutor to adapt to.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: There is no pivot learner turn for the tutor to adapt to.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: There is no learner resistance or breakdown to trigger a tutor strategy reversal.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism_quality.justification: No adaptive mechanism was triggered or required in this highly compliant exchange.

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to correctly label the forces on the cart using the 'object on cart' schema.
scored.actionalBreakthroughEvidence: Table on the cart, for the friction contact. The arrow direction checks which force it is, but the label is the object acting on the cart.
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner successfully applies the 'object on cart' schema to the friction force, identifying the table as the acting agent.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The learner makes no errors and shows no resistance, so the tutor does not need to adapt or reverse strategy.
scored.adaptiveMechanismQualityJustification: No adaptive mechanism is introduced as the learner proceeds without difficulty.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn, so there is no contingent tutor uptake.
